questionHtml: Suggest reasons for the difference between the fraction attributed to S. pneumoniae in all cases of ARI and in cases where antibiotics were used to treat the infection.
markschemeHtml:
1. highest attributed fraction (in both age groups) is in cases where antibiotic used;
  2. ARI cases due to S. pneumoniae can be severe so antibiotics are often prescribed;
  3. all cases include other causes / viral ARI which may not require antibiotics;
  4. antibiotics administered without prescription or physician consultation/to reduce symptoms;

Mpa: Comparative terms expected (do not award mp for just stating values).

meta.title: Suggest reasons for the difference between the fraction attributed to S. pneumoniae in all cases of ARI and in cases where antibiotics were used to treat the infection.
